name: Re-qliate
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>機殻の再星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>リクリフォート</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If a monster is Normal or Flip Summoned, and it is a Level 4 or lower monster: Negate its effects until the end of this turn. If a monster(s) is Special Summoned, and it is a Level 5 or higher monster: Negate its effects until the end of this turn, also banish it when it leaves the field. If there is no "Qli" card on the field, except "Re-qliate", send this card to the Graveyard.
eff: If a monster is Normal or Flip Summoned, and it is a Level 4 or lower monster: Negate its effects until the end of this turn. If a monster(s) is Special Summoned, and it is a Level 5 or higher monster: Negate its effects until the end of this turn, also banish it when it leaves the field. If there is no "Qli" card on the field, except "Re-qliate", send this card to the Graveyard.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
banished: Banishes other cards when they leave the field
